description: Replace fragmented file-based state management (PID files, processing.flag, IPC status commands) with a single SQLite database as the source of truth. CLI writes state directly to DB, daemon polls DB every second to update GTK icon. Eliminates icon/state inconsistency bugs caused by lost IPC messages.

userStories.title: Create state_db module with SQLite schema and accessors
userStories.description: New module state_db.py providing init_db(), get_state(), update_state() functions. Single table daemon_state with one row (id=1). Schema: status TEXT, daemon_pid INTEGER, recording_pid INTEGER, recording_path TEXT, post_processor TEXT, updated_at TEXT. WAL mode for concurrent reader/writer. All writes use BEGIN IMMEDIATE transactions.
acceptanceCriteria: state_db.py created with init_db(db_path), get_state(db_path) -> dict, update_state(db_path, **kwargs) functions
DB path: ~/.config/voice-input/state.db

Schema: daemon_state table with columns: id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY CHECK(id=1), status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'idle', daemon_pid INTEGER, recording_pid INTEGER, recording_path TEXT, post_processor TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'none', updated_at TEXT
init_db() creates table if not exists, inserts default row if empty, enables WAL mode
update_state() uses BEGIN IMMEDIATE transaction, updates updated_at automatically
get_state() returns dict with all column values
Thread-safe: each call opens/closes its own connection (no shared connection across threads)
CRITIC-R1-M1: state_db.py MUST define DB path directly as Path.home() / '.config' / 'voice-input' / 'state.db' — do NOT import CONFIG_DIR from voice_input.py to avoid circular import

CRITIC-R1-M3: init_db() must migrate POST_PROCESSOR_STATE_FILE value to DB on first init — if ~/.config/voice-input/current_post_processor.txt exists, read its value and update_state(post_processor=value) before deleting the file. This ensures US-003 reads correct value from DB
CRITIC-R1-L2: get_state() must call init_db() internally if table doesn't exist — defensive against access before explicit init_db() call
Unit tests for init_db, get_state, update_state, concurrent read/write, WAL mode verification
Unit test for post_processor migration from legacy file to DB
Tests pass

userStories.title: Migrate CLI state operations from files to SQLite
userStories.description: Replace file-based state in start_recording(), stop_recording(), toggle_recording() with SQLite calls. Remove PID_FILE writes/reads, PROCESSING_FILE writes/reads, AUDIO_PATH_FILE writes/reads. Replace is_recording() to read from DB instead of PID file check.
acceptanceCriteria: start_recording(): writes status='recording', recording_pid=PID, recording_path=path to DB instead of PID_FILE + AUDIO_PATH_FILE

CRITIC-R2-C1: stop_recording() must read recording_pid AND recording_path from DB via single get_state() call BEFORE the kill sequence — PID_FILE is no longer written, so PID_FILE.read_text() at line 339 will crash. Replace both PID_FILE.read_text (L339) and AUDIO_PATH_FILE.read_text (L353) with one get_state() at top
stop_recording(): writes status='processing' to DB instead of PROCESSING_FILE; reads recording_path from DB; writes status='idle' at end instead of deleting PROCESSING_FILE
toggle_recording(): checks DB status instead of PROCESSING_FILE existence; checks updated_at for 120s timeout
is_recording(): reads DB status=='recording' AND verifies recording_pid is alive (os.kill(pid,0))
Remove IPC commands: recording_start, recording_stop, set_idle — no longer needed for status
Keep IPC commands: transcribe, ping, get_model, set_post_processor, stop (still needed for data operations)
PID_FILE, PROCESSING_FILE, AUDIO_PATH_FILE constants kept but unused (backward compat cleanup in separate story)
Unit tests for each migrated function
Integration tests for toggle → start → stop → idle state transitions via DB
Tests pass

userStories.title: Daemon polls SQLite for icon status updates
userStories.description: Add _sync_status_from_db() to ASRDaemon that reads status from DB and calls set_status() if changed. Called every second in socket_server() timeout loop. Also write daemon_pid to DB on startup and clear on shutdown.
acceptanceCriteria: ASRDaemon._sync_status_from_db(): reads status from DB, compares with self._current_db_status, calls set_status() only if changed
self._current_db_status initialized to 'idle' in __init__
socket_server() calls _sync_status_from_db() on every socket.timeout (every 1 second)
Daemon run(): writes daemon_pid to DB on startup after lock acquired
Daemon run(): clears daemon_pid in DB on shutdown (in finally block)
is_daemon_running(): reads daemon_pid from DB, verifies process alive, cleans up if dead
Post-processor changes: daemon writes post_processor to DB in load_post_processor() instead of _persist_post_processor_id()
Daemon startup: reads post_processor from DB instead of POST_PROCESSOR_STATE_FILE
Unit tests for _sync_status_from_db with mock DB
Unit tests for daemon_pid lifecycle (write on start, clear on stop)
Integration test: write status to DB from external process, verify daemon picks it up
Tests pass

userStories.title: Update CLI status command and cleanup legacy files
userStories.description: Update voice-input status to read from SQLite. Remove legacy file constants and functions that are no longer used. Ensure backward compatibility during transition.
acceptanceCriteria: show_status(): reads status, daemon_pid, post_processor from DB instead of is_recording() + send_to_daemon()
Remove _persist_post_processor_id() and _restore_post_processor_id() — replaced by DB
Remove POST_PROCESSOR_STATE_FILE constant and file operations
Remove is_process_running() helper if no longer used
Keep daemon.lock and flock mechanism (not suitable for DB replacement)
Keep daemon.sock (IPC still needed for transcribe command)

CRITIC-R2-M1: Legacy file cleanup must be in voice_input.py ensure_config_dir() (NOT in state_db.py) — state_db.py cannot import voice_input constants due to circular import. ensure_config_dir() calls init_db() then deletes PID_FILE, PROCESSING_FILE, AUDIO_PATH_FILE if they exist

CRITIC-R1-M2: Update or replace ALL existing tests that reference removed functions: rewrite test_post_processor_persistence.py to test DB-based persistence, update TestIsProcessRunning/TestIsRecording in test_unit.py to test new DB-based implementations, update test_race.py and test_e2e.py references to is_process_running()

CRITIC-R3-C1: tests/test_integration.py EXISTS (453+ lines) — must update 6 test methods that reference removed IPC commands (recording_start/recording_stop/set_idle) and PID_FILE-based state. Rewrite to verify DB state transitions instead of IPC calls. Also update conftest.py mock_daemon_server to remove stale command responses
Unit tests for updated show_status()
Unit tests for legacy file cleanup on first init
E2E test: run voice-e2e-test skill (short 8s audio) to verify full pipeline works
E2E test: run test_e2e_kitty.py --duration 35 (long audio)
Tests pass
